properties.description: Detects potential MFA fatigue attacks where a user receives an abnormally high number of MFA requests in a short period. Maps to MITRE ATT&CK T1621 - Multi-Factor Authentication Request Generation.
properties.query:
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(10m)
| where ResultType == "50074" or ResultType == "50076"
| summarize
    MFARequestCount = count(),
    FirstRequest = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastRequest = max(TimeGenerated),
    IPAddresses = make_set(IPAddress),
    Locations = make_set(Location)
    by UserPrincipalName, AppDisplayName
| where MFARequestCount >= 10
| extend
    TimespanMinutes = datetime_diff('minute', LastRequest, FirstRequest),
    MITRETechnique = "T1621 - MFA Request Generation",
    RiskLevel = "High"
| project
    UserPrincipalName,
    AppDisplayName,
    MFARequestCount,
    TimespanMinutes,
    FirstRequest,
    LastRequest,
    IPAddresses,
    Locations,
    MITRETechnique,
    RiskLevel
